concept: Tender / Soft and Gentle / Easily Affected
description: Showing gentleness and concern; soft or delicate in substance. 'Phaeli' names the quality of tenderness—gentle touch, soft feeling, vulnerability that opens to care.
sound_symbolism: The word touches gently. 'Pha' /ɸa/ begins with soft breath, gentleness present. The vowel 'e' opens to feeling, sensitivity awakening. Then 'li' rests lightly, tenderness complete.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'phaeli thaemo' (tender heart). Can describe physical softness or emotional gentleness.

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Tender communication touches gently—words that acknowledge vulnerability and respond with care.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Tender awareness notices suffering—the soft heart that feels with others rather than hardening against pain.
